<!-- fork-banner -->
> ## ⚠️ Unofficial, auto-updated fork
>
> This repository is a **fork** of [`tailscale/tailscale-android`](https://github.com/tailscale/tailscale-android). It automatically tracks upstream `main` every few hours and re-publishes a signed APK carrying a few extra patches.
>
> **→ See [README-FORK.md](README-FORK.md)** for what's included, how it stays up to date, and how to install (including Obtainium auto-updates).
>
> Not affiliated with or endorsed by Tailscale Inc. Use at your own risk.
